markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Shape the Content Inventory Project and align on core functionality for the MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The MVP should focus on a simplified content inventory system with basic assignment tracking and brief creation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Standardize on Markdown for content editing, using TipTap editor components throughout the interface](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Prioritize creating a user-friendly dashboard with key metrics and easy access to content/assignment details](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Consider integrating AI-assisted features for content optimization and contextual guidance, but not as a core MVP feature](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Content Inventory System Architecture

  - [Proposed hierarchy: Account \> Workspace \> Projects \> Assignments/Opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Core data models: Pages (URLs), Keywords/Prompts, Topics, Clusters](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Assignments as central records, with associated Brief and Output documents](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Standardize on Markdown format for content, using TipTap editor components](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### MVP Features and Priorities

  - [Basic content inventory with URL importing from sitemaps](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Assignment tracking with simple status/milestone updates](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Brief creation and editing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Dashboard view with key metrics (e.g., pages tracked, activity snapshot, pipeline overview)](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Minimal permissioning system to start, focus on core functionality](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

### User Interface Considerations

  - [Aim for a hybrid approach: static dashboard components + dynamic, customizable views](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Consider integrating an AI chat/prompt feature for assistance, similar to Cursor or GitHub Copilot](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Explore contextual AI tips for improving specific content areas or fields](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

### Content Strategy and Organization

  - [Topics and Clusters help organize content strategy, but may not be essential for MVP](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Keywords remain relevant for volume prediction and opportunity assessment](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Consider future adaptations for AI/LLM-driven content discovery and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

### Bylines and Collaborators

  - [Track bylines (contributors) for SEO purposes and content attribution](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Manage internal collaborators (team members, reviewers) for workflow purposes](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Consider scraping existing byline data during initial content import](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize MVP feature set and prioritize core functionality](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Develop a simplified data model focusing on Pages, Assignments, and basic metadata](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Create initial UI mockups for the dashboard and assignment views](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Explore integration of TipTap editor components for Markdown-based content editing](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Investigate AI-assisted features for potential post-MVP implementation](https://fathom.video/share/iQKoBn2PACJbTPN9AzAUhWnKShSrJTf6?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
